tagline: Commercial Pool Experts — Indiana & Northern Kentucky

hero.headline:
300+ Commercial Pools Built, Renovated
& Maintained
hero.subheadline: With over 100 years of combined experience, Buddenbaum & Moore is Indiana's trusted partner for commercial pool construction, renovation, and maintenance. We handle the mechanical rooms so you can focus on your facility.

services.label: Our Commercial Services
services.headline: Full-Service Commercial Pool<br class="hidden md:block"> Solutions Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From new construction to daily maintenance, we keep commercial aquatic facilities running at peak performance across Indiana and Northern Kentucky.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Filtration, chemical control, treatment systems, pumps, VFDs, chlorine systems, UV treatment, CO2 systems, and complete mechanical room services to keep your facility compliant and running.

cards.title: New Pool Construction
cards.description: Competition pools, leisure pools, splash pads, lazy rivers, and feature pools — custom designed and built on schedule. You dream it, we create it.

cards.title: Pool Renovations
cards.description: Stainless steel gutter systems, structural repair, filter and mechanical room updates, and pool finish upgrades that extend the life of your investment.

cards.title: Equipment Sales & Distribution
cards.description: Authorized distributor for Accu-Tab, ProMinent, Neptune Benson, Pentair, Coates, Lochinvar, and SR Smith. We source and install the right equipment for your facility.

cards.title: Mechanical Room Services
cards.description: Complete design, installation, and servicing of commercial pool mechanical rooms — pumps, heaters, filtration, and chemical feed systems engineered for reliability.

cards.title: Design-Build Projects
cards.description: Turnkey aquatic facility development from concept through completion. Our team manages every phase so your project stays on time and on budget.

how_it_works.headline: How We Partner With Your Facility

steps.title: Schedule a Facility Assessment
steps.description: Contact us to discuss your commercial pool needs. We'll evaluate your facility, review your equipment, and provide a detailed scope of work — no obligation.

steps.title: We Deliver the Solution
steps.description: Our experienced team handles everything from construction and renovation to ongoing maintenance. We bring 100+ years of combined expertise to every project.

steps.title: Your Facility Runs Flawlessly
steps.description: With Buddenbaum & Moore as your partner, your aquatic facility stays compliant, safe, and operating at peak efficiency — so you can focus on your guests and members.

about.label: Why Facilities Trust Us
about.headline: Indiana's Commercial Pool Authority Since 2014
about.description: Buddenbaum & Moore, LLC was founded with a clear mission: deliver professional, high-quality commercial pool services that facility managers can depend on. With over 300 commercial pools built or renovated and 100+ years of combined experience across our team, we've earned the trust of municipalities, recreation centers, hotels, and aquatic facilities throughout Indiana and Northern Kentucky.

features.title: Authorized Equipment Distributors
features.description: We're factory-authorized for Accu-Tab, ProMinent, Neptune Benson, Pentair, Coates, Lochinvar, and SR Smith — ensuring you get genuine parts and expert installation.

features.title: Commercial-Only Specialists
features.description: We focus exclusively on commercial pools. No residential distractions — just deep expertise in the systems, codes, and standards that commercial facilities demand.

features.title: On-Time Construction Guarantee
features.description: We stake our reputation on meeting construction deadlines. With 300+ projects completed, our track record speaks for itself.

pricing.headline: Transparent Commercial Pricing.
pricing.subtitle: Every facility is different. Contact us for a custom proposal tailored to your pool size, equipment, and service needs — no hidden fees, no surprises.

guarantee.headline: Our Commercial Commitment
guarantee.description: We build long-term relationships, not one-time transactions. If any service or installation doesn't meet your expectations, we'll return and make it right at no additional cost. With an A+ BBB rating and 300+ completed projects, our word is our bond.

faqs.question: What types of commercial pools do you service?
faqs.answer: We service all commercial aquatic facilities including municipal pools, recreation centers, hotels, waterparks, fitness centers, HOA pools, and competition venues across Indiana and Northern Kentucky.

faqs.question: Are you authorized to sell and install major brand equipment?
faqs.answer: Yes. We are factory-authorized distributors for Accu-Tab, ProMinent Fluid Systems, Neptune Benson, Pentair Pool Products, Coates, Lochinvar, and SR Smith. This means genuine parts, factory training, and warranty-backed installations.

faqs.question: How long does a typical commercial pool construction project take?
faqs.answer: Timelines vary by scope, but most commercial pool construction projects range from 4 to 12 months. We pride ourselves on meeting deadlines — with 300+ projects completed, on-time delivery is a core part of our reputation.

faqs.question: Do you handle ongoing maintenance after construction?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer comprehensive maintenance programs covering filtration, chemical control, pump systems, UV treatment, CO2 systems, and full mechanical room services. Many of our construction clients transition to long-term maintenance partnerships.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve commercial facilities throughout Indiana and Northern Kentucky, with our headquarters in Noblesville, Indiana. For large-scale projects, we've traveled across the broader region as well.

testimonials.name: Municipal Aquatics Director
testimonials.text: Buddenbaum & Moore has been our go-to partner for commercial pool maintenance and renovations. Their expertise and professionalism are unmatched in the Indiana market.

testimonials.name: Recreation Center Manager
testimonials.text: The team delivered our new competition pool on schedule and within budget. Their combined experience really shows in the quality of their construction work.

testimonials.name: Hotel Property Manager
testimonials.text: We trust Buddenbaum & Moore with all our pool equipment needs. Their knowledge of commercial systems and prompt service keeps our facility running smoothly year-round.
